segments.text: Spacing to shut down that approach
segments.original_text: 対策する 先置きで相手の出掛かりを潰して

segments.text: Taking control of the tempo on this side
segments.original_text: 逆にこちら側がテンポを握っていくような

segments.text: That aerial game could work too
segments.original_text: そんな空中戦も展開しても必要があるか

segments.text: Dash attack closes it up fast
segments.original_text: ダッシュ攻撃でここは一気に前を詰めます
さあ手に入れたこの崖

segments.text: Chef's gotta land another fair, but...
segments.original_text: シェフから空前をもう一回掴むしかないが
苦しい復帰が始まった

full_text: Spacing to shut down that approach Taking control of the tempo on this side That aerial game could work too Up's good? Dash attack closes it up fast Chef with the forward tilt! Got the ledge! Chef's gotta land another fair, but... The recovery's looking rough now Gets the first edge trap! Still edgeguarding?

corrections.rule: Kanji homophone: 横行き→横強 (side strong attack)

corrections.original: シェフから空中戦をもう一回掴むしかないが
corrections.corrected: シェフから空前をもう一回掴むしかないが
corrections.rule: Move abbreviation: 空中戦→空前 (forward air)
Kanji homophone: 作る→狩る (to hunt/punish)
